Akeelah and the Bee (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $18,848,430Details
International Box Office $110,994
Worldwide Box Office $18,959,424
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $26,913,396
Total $26,913,396

Opening Weekend:$6,011,585 (31.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$8,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,195 opening theaters/2,195 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $34,416,371

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 28th, 2006 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: August 29th, 2006 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some language.
Running Time: 112 minutes
Plot point: African Americans, Child Prodigy, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Dysfunctional Family, Female empowerment, Inspirational Teacher, Single Parent, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Family Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
